title: Accessible Menu Bar

statement.markdown:
## Accessible Menu Bar

Your task is to create an accessible menu bar that allows users to navigate through different sections of the webpage.

### Requirements
1. The menu bar should be accessible via keyboard navigation.
2. The menu items should have an accessible name and a clear, visually distinct style.
3. The menu items should be navigable via keyboard (left and right, or up and down, arrow keys) and should focus the selected item when navigated to.
4. The menu items should have a clear indication of which item is focused.
5. The menu should be fully accessible and follow the Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG).
6. The menu bar should be styled using Tailwind CSS classes.

constraints: Maximum 200 LOC (Lines of Code) for the JavaScript code.
Use Tailwind CSS classes for styling.
Use HTML semantically for structuring the content of the menu bar.
